name: The Cube Hotel（Ning's Wing 2）
short_description: The Cube Hotel (a.k.a. Ning's Wing 2) is a puzzle adventure game. There are in total 4 branches, 10 endings, nearly 50 rooms and 50 puzzles in this game. If you are a fan of escape games, you should not miss this one.
detailed_description:
The Cube Hotel (a.k.a. Ning's Wing 2) is a puzzle adventure game. There are in total 4 branches, 10 endings, nearly 50 rooms and 50 puzzles in this game. If you are a fan of escape games, you should not miss this one.
In this game, you would play a pop star, Dana Ni, who wakes up to find herself in a hotel room. What she can remember is that she is on vacation with her best friend Seven. They stayed at the Cube Hotel which looks like a huge cube. But to Dana's surprise, Seven disappeared during midnigt. To figure out what's going on, she starts her adventure. Who will she meet with? What will happen to her? Let's find the answers in the game!
Good luck and have fun!
